title: Home
summary: Start here. A centralized portal for clients to access help articles, tools, and contact options.
markdown:
> 🧭 Start here. This Home page is your gateway to every client resource. Pick a quick action, fix an issue, or browse by category.

### 🔥 Quick actions

- Send your first push campaign
- Create collections for the home page
- Manage roles and permissions
- Content scheduling overview

### 🛠️ Fix an issue

- Menu items not appearing
- Can’t receive 2FA codes
- Push notification not delivered
- Data sync issues

---

- Getting started — first‑time setup and access

- Troubleshooting — fixes grouped by severity
- FAQ — quick answers to frequent questions

---

### 📣 What’s new

- Release notes — October 2025

---

### 🧩 Need more help?

> 📞 Urgent: Call (866) WEED‑APPS • Non‑urgent: email [support@dopetech.com](mailto:support@dopetech.com)

title: FAQ — Roles and permissions
summary: Who can do what in the Admin Panel and app.
markdown:
### What roles exist?

- Owner: Full access
- Admin: Manage content, notifications, settings
- Editor: Update content and campaigns
- Viewer: Read‑only

### Can roles be scoped per store?

Yes. Assign access by location where needed.

### How do I request access changes?

Email support with the user’s email, desired role, and locations.

title: Release notes — October 2025
summary: Highlights of recent improvements and fixes.
markdown:
### New

- Client portal Home page
- New Help views: Client portal, Getting started, Troubleshooting by severity, How‑to gallery

### Improved

- Admin Panel content collection flows

### Fixed

- Intermittent “No products found” in Admin Panel

### What’s next

- More client how‑tos and troubleshooting guides

title: Policy — Security and data handling
summary: Key practices for protecting customer and store data.
markdown:
### Principles

- Least privilege access
- Use MFA on all admin accounts
- Store credentials only in an approved password manager

### Data handling

- Never share customer PII in tickets or screenshots
- Redact sensitive fields before sharing

### Incident reporting

- Urgent issues: Call support line
- Non‑urgent: Email support with details and timestamps

title: How‑to: Send your first push campaign
summary: Create and send a targeted push in minutes from the Admin Panel.
markdown:
### Overview

Send a basic push notification to a test segment, verify delivery, then schedule a production send.

### Prerequisites

- Admin Panel access
- Test device registered
- Draft copy and image (optional)

### Steps

1. Open Admin Panel → Marketing → Push
2. Create campaign
   - Title: Welcome offer
   - Message: “Tap for 15% off your first app order”
   - Deeplink: Select a category or product
3. Choose audience
   - Start with a test segment (internal users)
4. Send test
5. Review results and fix any issues
6. Schedule production send
   - Time: Local peak browsing hours
   - Frequency cap: Enabled

### Verify success

- Test device receives push within 1 minute
- Deeplink opens the intended screen
- Delivery and open metrics appear in campaign analytics

### Troubleshooting

- No devices found → Ensure users opted in to notifications
- Deeplink opens wrong page → Re‑select deeplink target and retest

title: How‑to: Add a deals banner
summary: Add and schedule a promotional banner to highlight deals.
markdown:
### Overview

Create a banner to promote a sale or event.

### Steps

1. Admin Panel → Marketing → Banners
2. New banner
   - Title: concise offer (e.g., 20% Off Flower)
   - Image: 1600×900 recommended
   - Deep link: choose a category, collection, or product
3. Audience: All users (or segment)
4. Schedule start and end time
5. Save and enable

### Verify success

- Banner renders on app home within minutes and opens the linked screen

### Tips

- Keep text short, high‑contrast, and include a clear call to action
- Pair with a push campaign for lift

title: Troubleshooting: Menu items not appearing
summary: Diagnose why products or collections aren’t visible in the app.
markdown:
### Symptoms

- Category shows 0 items
- Collection appears empty

### Quick checks

1. Confirm products are in stock and visible in your POS/ecom system
2. Ensure the collection filter has results
3. In Admin Panel, run a manual sync if available

### Deeper checks

- Webhooks enabled and healthy
- Integration credentials valid and not expired
- Recent errors in Admin Panel logs

### Fix

- Update product visibility and re‑sync
- Re‑save collection filters
- Reconnect integration if tokens expired

### Verify success

- Items appear in app within 5–15 minutes

title: How‑to: Create collections for the home page
summary: Build product collections that power home page carousels.
markdown:
### Overview

Create curated collections to feature products on your app home page.

### Steps

1. Open Admin Panel → Content → Collections
2. New collection → Name it (e.g., Best Sellers, Staff Picks)
3. Add filters or select products manually
4. Save and set Visibility: On
5. Assign the collection to a Home section (Home layout → choose slot)

### Verify success

- Collection appears on the app home page within 5–15 minutes

### Tips

- Keep 6–12 items per collection for scannability
- Refresh weekly to keep content fresh

title: Getting started — Accessing your account
markdown:
### Summary

Help a new user sign in for the first time and confirm access.

### Prerequisites

- Invitation email sent by an admin
- Supported browser or latest app version

### Steps

1. Open the sign-in page or app
2. Enter the work email and select Continue
3. Verify email via 6‑digit code or magic link
4. Set a password if prompted
5. Confirm you can access the home screen and menu

### Expected outcome

User can log in and see the dashboard without errors.

### Troubleshooting

- No email received: check spam and allowlist the sender; request a new code
- Code expired: request a new one and use within 10 minutes
- “Account not found”: confirm invitation was sent to the same email

### Notes and links

- Reset password link
- Status page for outages

title: FAQ — Billing and invoices
markdown:
### Summary

Common billing and invoice questions and short answers.

### Prerequisites

- Admin or billing contact access

### Steps

1. View invoice history in Admin panel → Billing
2. Update payment method under Payment
3. Download latest invoice PDF from the Invoices tab

### Expected outcome

Billing contact can manage payment and retrieve invoices.

### Troubleshooting

- Payment failed: verify card limits and address; retry
- Can’t find invoice: adjust date range or contact support

### Notes and links

- W‑9, vendor info, and support email

title: How‑to — Invite a teammate
markdown:
### Summary

Show admins how to add a teammate with the right permissions.

### Prerequisites

- Admin role in the workspace

### Steps

1. Go to Admin panel → Users
2. Select Invite
3. Enter email and choose a role
4. Send invite

### Expected outcome

Teammate receives an invite and appears in the Users list as Pending until accepted.

### Troubleshooting

- Invite not received: resend invite and check spam
- Wrong role: edit user and change role after invite

### Notes and links

- Roles and permissions reference

title: Troubleshooting — Can’t receive 2FA codes
markdown:
### Summary

Resolve issues where users don’t receive two‑factor authentication codes.

### Prerequisites

- 2FA enabled on the account
- Correct phone number or authenticator app installed

### Steps

1. Verify the phone number or app is listed under security settings
2. Check device time is set to automatic
3. Try backup method: SMS vs authenticator app
4. Regenerate recovery codes and store securely
5. If still failing, disable and re‑enable 2FA to re‑bind the device

### Expected outcome

User receives a valid code and can complete sign‑in.

### Troubleshooting

- Delayed SMS: switch to authenticator app
- Time skew error: enable automatic time sync on device
- Lost device: use recovery codes or admin-assisted reset

### Notes and links

- Link to security best practices
